title: Resources
text:
## Data sharing and collaboration tools
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> GitLab: Code and containers repository][5]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Overleaf: LaTeX collaboration][12]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> EtherPad: Notebooks][3]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> BentoPDF: In-browser PDF editing and manipulation][15]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Jitsi: Video conferencing][10]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Nextcloud: File sharing][6]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Draw.io: Online flowchart and diagrams][18]
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Yopass: One-time secret sharing][16]
- [<Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> LanguageTool][17]: Use **`https://languagetool.nrp-nautilus.io/v2`** in the **`Server > Custom > Server URL`** menu within the settings of each addon or plugin (such as Chrome or Microsoft Word).
- [<Badge text="Unsupported" variant="caution" /> Hedgedoc: collaborative markdown editor][14]
- [<Badge text="Unsupported" variant="caution" /> SyncThing: File sync][8] ([Contact us to set up](https://nrp.ai/contact))

## Monitoring

- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> PerfSONAR][11]
- [<Badge text="Unsupported" variant="caution" /> Traceroute tool][7]
